channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Trump couldn't pronounce 'Assyrians.' The community is happy to be in the spotlight
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — It was Donald Trump's mispronunciation that first caught attention. “Also, we have many Asur-Asians in our room,” Trump said at a weekend rally in Prescott Valley, Arizona. “We have some incredible people in our room.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN J. COOPER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Judge unseals heavily redacted trove of evidence in Trump's 2020 election interference case
item.description: The judge overseeing Donald Trump's 2020 election interference case made public Friday a heavily redacted trove of documents that provide a small glimpse into the evidence prosecutors will present if the case ever goes to trial.
item.dc:creator: ERIC TUCKER and ALANNA DURKIN RICHER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Fox's Bret Baier acknowledges 'mistake' in Harris interview over airing of Trump clip
item.description: Fox News anchor Bret Baier says he “made a mistake” during his interview with Kamala Harris in not airing video of a controversial Donald Trump comment — but it wasn't fully clear what the mistake was.
item.dc:creator: David Bauder, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Biden administration races to shell out billions for clean energy as election nears
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Biden administration is shelling out billions of dollars for clean energy and approving major offshore wind projects as officials race to secure major climate initiatives before President Joe Biden's term comes to an end.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER McDERMOTT and MATTHEW DALY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: GOP lawmakers seek investigation of consulting firm over its work in China
item.description: A group of Republican lawmakers is demanding a federal investigation into the U.S. consulting firm McKinsey over its work with the Chinese government and state-owned enterprises.
item.dc:creator: Didi Tang, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Election 2024: How the 'New York Seven' could decide the House
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – New York voters have much to consider on Election Day. In addition to voting for the next president of the United States, New Yorkers will be asked to decide on a proposed amendment to the state Constitution, a U.S. Senate seat, and House representatives.
item.dc:creator: Henry Rosoff, PIX 11

item.title: FLASHBACK: Harris declined to intervene on behalf of native tribe push to protect sacred site from wind farm
item.description: CA AG Kamala Harris' office said it did not have legal standing to take up the case of a Native American group fighting to preserve sacred burial ground from a wind farm.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: North Carolina early voters, still recovering from Helene, exceed 2020 voter turnout
item.description: The number of people casting ballots on the first day of early in-person voting in presidential battleground North Carolina exceeded the first-day total four years ago — even as Hurricane Helene recovery continued in the mountains.
item.dc:creator: Gary D. Robertson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump campaign slams 'witch hunt' after Jack Smith court docs released less than 3 weeks before election
item.description: The judge in former President Trump's federal election interference case on Friday made public more documents from Special Counsel Jack Smith's investigation into the former president just weeks before the 2024 election.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump earned money from government sources through Washington hotel, Democrats find
item.description: Over 11 months while former President Trump was in office, his Washington, D.C., hotel took in some $300,000 from sources inside and outside of government, including tens of thousands in payments from the U.S. Secret Service.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 5 takeaways from the Nevada Senate debate
item.description: Sen. Jacky Rosen (D-Nev.) and Republican Sam Brown duked it out during their first and only debate Thursday night, making their pitches to voters in one of the key battleground states on the 2024 map and a must-win state for Democratic Senate majority hopes.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, NewsNation

item.title: Nevada Senate hopefuls tackle trans athletes, immigration and UFOs in only debate
item.description: Sen. Jackie Rosen and Republican candidate Sam Brown went head to head in the Nevada Senate debate on immigration, the economy and biological males competing in women's sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Voter frustration with crime, liberal DAs mounting in California while Harris mum on controversial Prop 47
item.description: Rising retail theft over the past several years, often done by organized crime, has California voters more inclined to repeal Prop. 47, which lessened penalties for theft under $950.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Crunch time: Harris to team up with Barack and Michelle Obama next week in key battlegrounds
item.description: As the 2024 election showdown between Vice President Kamala Harris and former President Trump reaches the home stretch, Harris is teaming up with Barack and Michelle Obama in key battleground states
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Haitian migration roils town in key battleground state with signs of pro-Trump support on the rise
item.description: The town of Charleroi has come under scrutiny after President Trump pointed to an influx of Haitian immigration into the small town in the battleground state.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: At Wisconsin stops, Harris campaign features less talk of joy and more attacks on Trump
item.description: In La Crosse on Thursday, Harris told a rally crowd that Trump “will stop at nothing to claim unchecked power for himself.” It’s a shift from the “joy” that swirled around her elevation to the top of the Democratic ticket this summer.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Lydia Dominguez talks leadership, safety, and accountability in school board run for District B
item.description: Lydia Dominguez, candidate for the Clark County School Board in District B, joined the 8 News Now Daily Voting Guide to outline her vision for the district, focusing on financial accountability, student safety, and parental involvement.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: 3 states renew efforts to limit abortion pill access
item.description: The lawsuit was filed in a Texas federal court, roughly four months after the Supreme Court decided against undoing changes to the FDA’s regulations on the abortion pill that expanded access.
item.dc:creator: Alejandra O'Connell-Domenech, NewsNation

item.title: Almost 23% of people say politics influences where they live: Poll
item.description: "Some go so far as to consider moving to find that alignment," Danielle Hale, chief economist for Realtor.com, said.
item.dc:creator: Cassie Buchman, Fox 5

item.title: Harris, Bret Baier spar over immigration at outset of Fox News interview
item.description: Vice President Harris on Wednesday sparred at length with Fox News anchor Bret Baier over immigration in a rare sit-down with the network. Baier opened the interview by asking Harris how many immigrants had crossed the southern border during the Biden administration.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: Elon Musk has given $75 million, so far, to put Donald Trump back in the White House
item.description: Elon Musk is among the largest financial supporters of Donald Trump's reelection efforts, new FEC filings show. He and two other megadonors collectively gave $300 million to support Trump.
item.dc:creator: Eric McDaniel, MPR News

item.title: Jimmy Carter, at age 100, casts his 2024 ballot by mail
item.description: His son Chip Carter said before the family gathering that his father had this election very much in mind.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Harris campaign hosts separated families ahead of Trump's Univision town hall
item.description: The Harris campaign has mostly centered its immigration and border security messaging on enforcement, drawing some criticism from advocates.
item.dc:creator: Rafael Bernal, NewsNation

item.title: Control of the Minnesota House is up for grabs this fall. Here are 14 races to watch
item.description: While all seats in the Minnesota House of Representatives are on the ballot this fall, just a fraction are taking up the focus and much of the fundraising for the major parties.
item.dc:creator: Dana Ferguson, MPR News

item.title: Minnesota city says Trump campaign still owes more than $200,000 for July rally
item.description: Local officials say former President Donald Trump’s campaign still owes a central Minnesota city nearly $209,000 for services related to a July campaign rally. The Minnesota Star Tribune reports that the bill is for services beyond what St. Cloud normally provides.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Election 2024: Races to watch in New Jersey
item.description: NEW JERSEY (PX11) -- It's been one of the most notable years for New Jersey politics in recent memory — indictments, upsets, and loss are just some themes of what has been a year that could shape the Garden State's political future for years to come.
item.dc:creator: Jim Vasil, PIX 11
